Video.summary: 5-Minute Crafts is the most-watched DIY digital brand in the world, known for its positive, entertaining, and quirky DIY crafts.
Video.title: 5-Minute Crafts

Video.summary: Are you ready for mind-blowing cement crafts? We will show you a cute revitalizing concrete waterfall with tiny pleasant fish made by a craftsman, fantastic geode coffee table made of cement and epoxy, and amazing cement&gypsum crafts for home decoration.
Video.grandparentTitle: Incredible Cement Crafts And Repair Hacks
Video.title: 5-Minute Crafts

Video.summary: You can make parenting easier with these amazing gadgets! Here you'll find cool gadgets for kids' creativity, smart bathroom and kitchen gadgets, and useful school supplies every parent will want to try!
Video.grandparentTitle: Smart Gadgets Every Parent Will Appreciate
Video.title: 5-Minute Crafts

Video.summary: Create a cozy space in your home! We showed how to make a dream platform bed with your hands and easy hacks to transform your old bedroom into a chic and trendy space!
Video.grandparentTitle: Incredible Bedroom Transformations And Decorating Hacks
Video.title: 5-Minute Crafts
